policy_description: Decision input records user-selected rows from the prior read-only review.
Only the five named user-selected rows are accepted for future cross-check.
Accepted for cross-check is not a dataset-ready label.
All non-selected rows remain pending manual review.
No training is allowed or performed.
Accepted rows require future raw mmCIF struct_conn cross-check before dataset-ready status.
Feature semantics audit remains required before training.
Leakage/split gate remains required before training.
Step 14O template artifacts are read-only inputs.
PDB ID or ligand ID alone is not an event identity.
